title: TPSTabPlugin
description: this plugin adds to the tab: ping, tps and mspt.
body:
TPSTabPlugin is a plugin that shows how well your server is performing and displays in a table: ping, tps and mspt.

**this is what it looks like in the tab:**

![this is what it looks like in the tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53fe41cb6a795b28653b9a58c28590f7cba8512b.png)   

if you write the command /tpstab hotbar, it will appear on the hotbar:

![if you write the command /tpstab hotbar, it will appear on the hotbar:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2613c7ecb5db076484e403a43a639e7c48296e89.png)

There are also these commands:

![There are also these commands:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4479a880b544b6f3e695bd0bd1860e4893027e07.png)
